Emily started with 25 dogs and added 4 puppies plus 1 stray, bringing the total to 30 before any adoptions occurred. On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which means 6 dogs left the center, so the calculation is 30 minus 6. The final count depends on the [location], the [date], the [time], the [name], the [breed], and the [status] of each animal.

***

After subtracting the 6 adopted dogs from the 30 total, Emily now has 24 dogs remaining in her rescue center. This number reflects the current population based on the [owner], the [tag], the [food], the [vet], the [cost], and the [plan] for future care.
